heading: Carrajung vs Carrajung Lower — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrajung, Victoria and Carrajung Lower, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrajung Lower has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Carrajung (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrajung or Carrajung Lower safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrajung has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Carrajung Lower scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrajung scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Carrajung Lower scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrajung or Carrajung Lower?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrajung Lower has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
